PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kent Wu appeared in court in Propria Persona.

The Court waives any technical defect in the notice and asks Mr. Wu what his plan is. Mr. Wu stated that right now he is renting the property out, that he bought the property twenty years ago, that he added his parents on title and that he thought the property was held as joint tenants, but it is held in tenants-in-common. Mr. Wu also stated that when his mother passed away, she gave all of the cash and jewelry to his sister, that he was to get the property, that the plan is to have the Court award him with the rest of the 20% of the property and that the post plan is to do a living trust and leave his sister as a Beneficiary. In addition, Mr. Wu stated that he has retained a Lawyer, but only on advice. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Bond is waived. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for November 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for July 18, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
